summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected. Six hydrated open PRs were quarantined with route_security because deterministic validation marked those targets security-sensitive. Nineteen refs could not be classified because live state was unavailable from the preflight artifact due GitHub API rate limits.
